deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by ~$93K-$143K. VA loan payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Double-carrying costs. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.

Market analysis sent, three options laid out
Comprehensive CMA done, underwater status confirmed
